## Milestone

M{N} — {Name}

## Product Goal

What can an agent or human *do* after this ships that they couldn't before?
Write it as a one-sentence story from the user's perspective, not the system's.
This is the yardstick the PR is measured against.

Example: "As an autonomous agent, I can submit a batch of browse commands and
receive a structured block before any denied command executes."

Bad example: "Add batch command parser."

## Background

Why this is needed.

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] Specific, testable criterion

## Technical Notes

Files to modify, patterns to follow, dependencies.

## Out of Scope

What explicitly NOT to do.
